title: Show My Enchants
description: A mod that show the enchantments on the UI instead of the button's tool-tip
body:
# Show My Enchants!
A Simple Mod That Displays The First Enchantment Hint On The GUI Instead Of The Button's Tool-Tip

[![Ko-Fi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a256a4dae1bca31bcf4b240ac2dcd3abcd255b80.png)](https://ko-fi.com/F1F11O4DZR)

## Features
* Enabled/Disable Mod On Options Menu
* Enabled/Disable Vanilla Tool-Tip From Button
* Change Text Fonts (Normal, SGA, Runatica)
* Custom Font: Runatica

### What Is Runatica?
Runatica Is A Custom Font That I Made While Bored In Class. It Is Inspired By Nordic Runes

![Preview Runatica](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/pxq3jokg/images/15d1558d81035f44886c1fdc7a6c2783a34c092f.png)
